## Confections.IRolledTruffleVersion interface

Version interface for rolled truffle confections. Includes enrobing and coating specifications.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IRolledTruffleVersion extends IConfectionVersionBase 
```
**Extends:** [IConfectionVersionBase](./ts-chocolate.confections.iconfectionversionbase.md)
